title: zinnia oligantha
intro: Zinnia oligantha, also known as the Mexican Zinnia, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its small, daisy-like flowers and slender stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Zinnia oligantha include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
